flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Chicago State University are 25% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($42.8k vs $57.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Chicago State University fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (21.0% → 15.5%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Chicago State University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.2k → $12.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Chicago State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.4k → $12.8k).
